decks.notes: This Storm combo deck aims to quickly generate mana with cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal, leading to a high storm count for powerful spells like Tendrils of Agony or Ad Nauseam to finish off the opponent. The deck includes plenty of tutors and discard spells to ensure the combo pieces come together smoothly. Urza's Saga and Wishclaw Talisman provide additional utility and consistency. The deck is designed to overwhelm the opponent with a flurry of spells and win in a single explosive turn.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with powerful creatures like Archon of Cruelty and Griselbrand, and then bring them back onto the battlefield using cards like Reanimate and Animate Dead. The deck also includes disruptive cards like Unmask and Cabal Therapy to disrupt the opponent's game plan. With a focus on fast combo plays and graveyard interaction, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures before they have a chance to respond effectively.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifacts and synergies with cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays. Urza's Saga provides additional artifact support, while cards like Force of Will protect your key pieces. The deck aims to control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan while steadily applying pressure. With a mix of powerful artifact creatures and efficient spells, it looks to win the game in the early to mid game stages, utilizing a combination of aggression and disruption to secure victory.

This deck focuses on quickly disrupting the opponent's game plan and controlling the board while efficiently deploying threats to pressure the opponent. Utilizing cards like Brainstorm, Thoughtseize, Daze, and Force of Will to disrupt the opponent's strategy, the deck aims to protect its own threats like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Abhorrent Oculus. Reanimate is used to bring back powerful creatures like Barrowgoyf. The deck looks to control the game tempo, disrupt the opponent's plays, and close out the game quickly with its aggressive creatures.

This deck focuses on utilizing Gaea's Cradle to generate massive amounts of mana in order to play powerful creatures and spells, while also disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Wasteland and Collector Ouphe. By ramping quickly and efficiently, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a wide array of threats and disruptive elements, ultimately taking control of the game and dominating the board state. With a versatile toolbox of creatures and spells, this deck is well-equipped to handle a variety of different matchups and adapt to different strategies.

The main goal of this deck is to quickly bring out powerful creatures such as Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Griselbrand onto the battlefield using cards like Show and Tell and Sneak Attack. Atraxa, Grand Unifier helps to set up the combo pieces, while Stock Up helps to filter through the deck for key cards. The use of mana acceleration cards like Lotus Petal and Simian Spirit Guide allows for faster plays, while counterspells like Force of Will and Flusterstorm help protect the combo pieces. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with big creatures and powerful plays.

The deck focuses on being aggressive and disrupting opponent's strategies while maintaining tempo. It utilizes powerful spells and creatures like Dragon's Rage Channeler, Murktide Regent, and Cori-Steel Cutter to apply pressure, while also utilizing counterspells like Force of Will and Daze to control the game. The deck aims to quickly close out the game by leveraging its powerful threats and disrupting opponent's plays, making it a formidable force in the Legacy format.

This UWx Control deck focuses on utilizing a variety of control elements to disrupt the opponent's game plan while gradually building up card advantage and control of the board. The deck features a mix of counter spells, removal, card draw, and powerful planeswalkers to outvalue the opponent and ultimately secure victory through attrition. By efficiently answering threats, controlling the tempo of the game, and generating incremental advantage, this deck aims to outlast and outmaneuver its opponents in the long game.

The deck aims to quickly and efficiently cheat giant creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn into play by utilizing cards like Show and Tell and Sneak Attack. By leveraging powerful free spells like Force of Will and efficient card draw like Brainstorm and Ponder, the deck can assemble the necessary pieces to overwhelm opponents in a single explosive turn. The inclusion of Omniscience allows for even further game-ending plays, making it a dominant force in the combo-based Legacy format.

The deck focuses on utilizing control elements like countermagic, removal spells, and land disruption to maintain board control and outvalue the opponent. It also includes card advantage engines like Brainstorm, Ponder, and Tamiyo to help maintain a consistent hand and filter through the deck for answers. The inclusion of some powerful threats like Murktide Regent and Quantum Riddler allows the deck to close out games quickly once the opponent's resources have been depleted. The deck aims to control the game tempo and grind the opponent out of resources until it can secure a win.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with cards like Arclight Phoenix, using spells like Buried Alive and Dark Ritual to enable early game aggression. Force of Will provides protection while Thoughtseize disrupts the opponent's strategy. Murktide Regent acts as a powerful threat that can close out the game, while Lightning Bolt and other burn spells help finish off opponents. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast and efficient plays, utilizing a mix of creatures, spells, and disruption to control the game's pace and outcome.

This UR Tempo deck focuses on utilizing cheap, efficient spells and creatures to maintain control of the game while applying pressure to the opponent. Cards like Dragon's Rage Channeler, Delver of Secrets, and Murktide Regent help maintain card advantage and quickly close out games. In addition, cards like Force of Will and Daze provide disruption for the opponent's game plan, while Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning offer direct damage to control the board. The deck aims to establish a fast clock while disrupting the opponent's strategy, ultimately leading to victory through tempo advantage.

The deck revolves around using the combination of Show and Tell, Sneak Attack, and Atraxa, Grand Unifier to quickly bring out powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Griselbrand onto the battlefield, bypassing their high mana costs. It includes strong control elements with cards like Force of Will and Flusterstorm to protect the combo pieces. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with massive threats early in the game, often leading to a quick victory before they can respond effectively.

This deck focuses on using fast mana acceleration and disruption spells to quickly fill the graveyard with Arclight Phoenixes and then bring them back to the battlefield for repetitive damage. The key strategy is to maximize the use of spells like Brainstorm and Buried Alive to set up explosive turns, while also using cards like Thoughtseize and Force of Will to prevent the opponent from interfering with the game plan. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with repeatable damage from Arclight Phoenix while also disrupting their game plan.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize efficient spells and creatures to control the tempo of the game and apply pressure to the opponent. By combining powerful threats like Dragon's Rage Channeler, Murktide Regent, and Delver of Secrets with counterspells like Daze and Force of Will, this deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while quickly closing out the match with burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning. With a focus on resource denial through cards like Wasteland and disruption through tempo plays, this deck seeks to establish dominance on the battlefield and secure a victory.

The deck focuses on playing creatures with strong abilities and using ramp spells like Green Sun's Zenith to quickly get them onto the battlefield. It also includes disruptive creatures like Collector Ouphe and Quirion Ranger to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its aggressive creatures while also having answers to their threats through cards like Swords to Plowshares and Sylvan Safekeeper. Gaea's Cradle provides additional mana acceleration for the deck.
